source: Hand-listed 14-bar low/close series constructed so exactly two swing-low pivots exist (index 2, level 6.0, confirmed at index 4; index 9, level 7.0, confirmed at index 11). Closes are chosen so: indices 0-3 have no confirmed base (None); indices 4-6 report the first base (6.0); index 7 closes below 6.0, cracking it (None, same-bar per the addendum's boundary pin); indices 8-10 stay None (base1 cracked, base2 not yet confirmed); indices 11-12 report base2 (7.0); index 13 closes below 7.0, cracking it again (None). Expected values computed by an independent, from-spec reference implementation (scratchpad/gen_golden_p1b45.py, ref_qfl_bases), NOT by running tradekit's stub.
